name: Beef Barley Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Pearl barley, salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the hamburger over medium heat until browned and cooked through.
2. Add the chopped onion, celery, and green pepper to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are softened.
3. Stir in the tyme, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, Chile sauce, canned tomatoes, water, and pearl barley with salt and pepper. Mix well.
4. Reduce heat to low and stir gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat further so it simmers slowly until the barley is tender and cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Note: Make sure to turn off the heat once the barley is fully cooked to prevent any accidental burns or overcooking.
